prompt: Sharpen the anatomical structures in the brain MRI (image 1) by using the Canny edge map from image 2 as a structural guide. Emphasize the cortical boundaries and inner contours indicated by the reference edges, while preserving the grayscale intensity and radiological texture of the original scan.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the brain MRI scan, by sharpening its anatomical structures. Use image 2, the Canny edge map, as a structural guide to emphasize the cortical boundaries and inner brain contours. Ensure the edited image retains the grayscale intensity and radiological texture of the original scan.
